title: Light Norwegian Petit Pois Soup
description: A bright, mild soup made from petit pois (snow peas) simmered with a quick deglaze for depth, perfect for meal prep and egg‑free friendly.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion, carrot, celery and garlic; sauté 5 min until softened.
Stir in white wine, let reduce for 2 min to deglaze the pan, scraping up brown bits.
Add snow peas and vegetable broth; bring to a gentle boil.
Reduce heat, cover and simmer for 10 min until peas are tender.
Season with salt, pepper, and dried dill; adjust as needed.
Use an immersion blender to partially puree for a silky texture, or leave chunky for contrast.
Serve warm, or allow to cool and store in airtight containers for up to 3 days.
